mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, price_adult, price_child, price_infant, age_adult, age_child, age_infant, flight_info, included_items, excluded_items, guide_name, guide_phone, meeting_location, meeting_time, notes, insurance_info, emergency_contact, passport_visa_info, other_notices, surcharge_info, terms, reservation_notes, entry_regulations, created_at, updated_at FROM air_details WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO air_details ( product_id, price_adult, price_child, price_infant, age_adult, age_child, age_infant, flight_info, included_items, excluded_items, guide_name, guide_phone, meeting_location, meeting_time, notes, insurance_info, emergency_contact, passport_visa_info, other_notices, surcharge_info, terms, reservation_notes, entry_regulations, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{priceAdult}, #{priceChild}, #{priceInfant}, #{ageAdult}, #{ageChild}, #{ageInfant}, #{flightInfo}, #{includedItems}, #{excludedItems}, #{guideName}, #{guidePhone}, #{meetingLocation}, #{meetingTime}, #{notes}, #{insuranceInfo}, #{emergencyContact}, #{passportVisaInfo}, #{otherNotices}, #{surchargeInfo}, #{terms}, #{reservationNotes}, #{entryRegulations}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE air_details SET price_adult = #{priceAdult}, price_child = #{priceChild}, price_infant = #{priceInfant}, age_adult = #{ageAdult}, age_child = #{ageChild}, age_infant = #{ageInfant}, flight_info = #{flightInfo}, included_items = #{includedItems}, excluded_items = #{excludedItems}, guide_name = #{guideName}, guide_phone = #{guidePhone}, meeting_location = #{meetingLocation}, meeting_time = #{meetingTime}, notes = #{notes}, insurance_info = #{insuranceInfo}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, passport_visa_info = #{passportVisaInfo}, other_notices = #{otherNotices}, surcharge_info = #{surchargeInfo}, terms = #{terms}, reservation_notes = #{reservationNotes}, entry_regulations = #{entryRegulations}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
